findings.description: Knowledge file writes 'window.open関数の第2引数' and 'window.open関数の第3引数', but source has the typo 'windwo.open関数'. The knowledge file silently corrects the source typo without basis in the source text.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'windwo.open関数の第2引数(JavaScript)に指定する' / 'windwo.open関数の第3引数(JavaScript)に指定する'

findings.description: Knowledge file writes 'XHTMLのsrc属性' for the src attribute description, but the source says 'XHTMLのcharsrc属性'. The knowledge file silently corrects what appears to be a source typo.
